alerts.title: Iran-Israel ceasefire fractures as direct missile exchanges resume
alerts.summary: Iran launched missiles at Israel in first bombardment since April ceasefire; Israel responded with air strikes on Lebanon. Multiple sources (NPR, BBC, AP News, PBS, WSJ, Al Jazeera) confirm kinetic exchanges. Despite Trump's stated calls to de-escalate, active missile and air strikes contradict negotiation narrative (incidents feed, 25+ reports).

alerts.title: Iran nuclear breakout window remains 1-2 weeks amid active escalation
alerts.summary: Iran maintains 60% U-235 enrichment with estimated 1-2 week breakout timeline. IAEA board passed resolution demanding uranium stock reporting and inspector access. Escalation in kinetic exchanges compresses negotiation window and raises proliferation risk (global_metrics, incidents).

alerts.title: Trump claims US-Iran deal imminent; conflicting signals undermine credibility
alerts.summary: Trump stated US-Iran deal scheduled for signing Sunday and repeatedly cited 'progress in talks,' yet concurrent Iran missile strikes and Israeli airstrikes on Lebanon undermine de-escalation claims. Iran downplayed peace-agreement claims via Radio Free Europe, signaling skepticism (incidents feed).

alerts.title: Israel issues forced displacement orders in south Lebanon amid escalating strikes
alerts.summary: Al Jazeera reports five killed as Israel hits south Lebanon and issues forced displacement orders. Coincides with Hezbollah elevated status and active fire exchanges (incidents feed). Represents potential expansion of conflict footprint beyond Israel-Iran direct engagement.

alerts.title: Three US carriers and amphibious assets maintain critical theater positioning
alerts.summary: USS Dwight D. Eisenhower (Red Sea), USS Abraham Lincoln (Arabian Sea), and USS Gerald R. Ford (Mediterranean) remain deployed with supporting destroyers (Carney, Mason, Laboon) and amphibious asset USS Bataan in Red Sea. USS Florida submarine positioned in Persian Gulf. Asset concentration reflects sustained US readiness posture amid Iran-Israel escalation (assets feed, 54 articles analyzed).
alerts.region: Red Sea, Arabian Sea, Persian Gulf, Mediterranean

analysis_note: Iran-Israel direct missile exchanges shatter April ceasefire despite Trump's de-escalation rhetoric; nuclear breakout window compresses to 1-2 weeks while diplomatic claims lose credibility amid active hostilities and expanded Lebanon strikes.
